chain_name: Design System Harmonization — Luminous Pastels + WCAG AA
orchestrator_notes: Agents: Read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. All design decisions are finalized in the spec document. Reference mockups at frontend/mock/ (gitignored but present locally). The design-system-sample-v2.html is the authoritative visual reference. Key changes: agent colors → Luminous Pastels, --text-muted → #8895a8, --text-secondary → #a3aac4, tinted badges (rgba 0.15 bg + bright text), square badge geometry (border-radius 8px), stat pills replace donuts. Status colors are UNCHANGED.

sessions.title: Design Token Update & SCSS Foundation
planned_tasks: Update 6 agent hex values in design-tokens.scss (old → Luminous Pastels)
Update --text-muted from #5a6a80 to #8895a8 in main.scss CSS vars
Update --text-secondary from #8f97b7 to #a3aac4 in main.scss CSS vars
Update --border-subtle from rgba(255,255,255,0.08) to rgba(255,255,255,0.10)
Update agent-colors.scss CSS custom properties to Luminous Pastels
Add --badge-text: #0e1c2d token
Add tinted background rgba variants for each agent
Update variables.scss if agent colors referenced there
Audit all design-token-exempt comments for validity
Run npm run lint to verify zero errors

planned_tasks: Update 6 hex values in AGENT_COLORS in agentColors.js
Verify synonym mappings still resolve correctly

Run existing Vitest tests
